title.en: Inside the HR-WPAN MAC (Part 1): Piconets, Joining, Channel Access, and Framing
title.zh: 走进 HR-WPAN MAC 层（上）：微微网、入网、信道接入与成帧

blocks.en: Clause 7 of IEEE Std 802.15.3-2016 is the medium access control (MAC) functional description — the rulebook for how high-rate wireless personal area network (HR-WPAN) devices share the air. A piconet (a small short-range network) is run by one device acting as the piconet coordinator (PNC), which beacons once per superframe (a repeating time frame) and hands out airtime. A device is just called a DEV. This first half walks through the lifecycle: a device finds and joins a piconet, the PNC schedules access, and the MAC chops or bundles data to fit. Clause 7.1 (the introduction) sets two ground rules used throughout: a frame is 'received' only when both the header check sequence (HCS) and the frame check sequence (FCS) pass, and asynchronous data must be delivered upward in the order it arrived.
blocks.zh: IEEE Std 802.15.3-2016 的第 7 章是媒体接入控制（MAC）功能描述——它规定了高速率无线个域网（HR-WPAN）设备如何共享空口。一个微微网（piconet，短距离小型网络）由一个充当微微网协调器（PNC）的设备管理；PNC 在每个超帧（superframe，周期性的时间帧）发送一次信标，并分配空口时间。普通设备称为 DEV。本课（上半部分）按生命周期讲解：设备发现并加入微微网、PNC 调度接入、MAC 对数据进行分片或聚合以适配传输。第 7.1 节（引言）确立了贯穿全章的两条基本规则：只有当头部校验序列（HCS）和帧校验序列（FCS）都通过时，帧才算被“收到”；异步数据必须按到达顺序向上层递交。

blocks.en: Starting and maintaining piconets (7.2). A piconet begins when a PNC-capable DEV becomes the PNC. There are independent piconets (standalone), parent piconets (hosting others), and dependent piconets that borrow airtime from a parent — split into child piconets (the child PNC is also a member of the parent) and neighbor piconets (the neighbor PNC is not a member). Before starting, a DEV does passive scanning: it listens on each channel for at least mMinChannelScan for beacons or sync frames (7.2.1 scanning). To start (7.2.2), the chosen DEV re-listens to confirm the channel is clear, then beacons every superframe. When the PNC wants to leave, it can transfer control: PNC handover (7.2.3) picks the most qualified successor using a priority table, transfers all device and timing records, then announces the switch in the beacon; preliminary handover (7.2.4) pre-loads that information into a chosen successor ahead of time; next PNC (7.2.5) names a fallback so that if the PNC vanishes without warning, the named device takes over by implicit handover.
blocks.zh: 启动与维护微微网（7.2）。当一个具备 PNC 能力的 DEV 成为 PNC 时，微微网即建立。微微网分为：独立微微网（独立运行）、父微微网（承载其他微微网）、以及向父微微网借用时间的从属微微网——后者又分为子微微网（子 PNC 同时是父微微网成员）和邻居微微网（邻居 PNC 不是父微微网成员）。启动前，DEV 进行被动扫描：在每个信道上至少侦听 mMinChannelScan 时间以捕获信标或同步帧（7.2.1 扫描）。启动时（7.2.2），所选 DEV 再次侦听确认信道空闲，然后每个超帧发送信标。当 PNC 想离开时可移交控制权：PNC 移交（7.2.3）依据优先级表选出最合格的继任者，传输全部设备与定时记录，再在信标中宣布切换；预备移交（7.2.4）提前把这些信息预载到选定的继任者；下一任 PNC（7.2.5）则指定一个备援，使得 PNC 无预警消失时，被指定设备通过隐式移交接管。

blocks.en: Dependent piconets reuse a parent's airtime via a private CTA — a channel time allocation whose source and destination are the same device, used purely to reserve a slot rather than to carry traffic. A child PNC is a parent member (so it can talk to both nets); a neighbor PNC is an outsider that may even run a non-802.15.3 protocol inside its borrowed slot.
blocks.zh: 从属微微网通过私有 CTA 复用父微微网的时间——私有 CTA 是源和目的为同一设备的信道时间分配（CTA），仅用于预留时隙而非承载流量。子 PNC 是父微微网成员（因而可与两个网络通信）；邻居 PNC 是外来者，甚至可在其借得的时隙内运行非 802.15.3 协议。

blocks.en:
flowchart TD
  A[PNC-capable DEV] --> B[7.2.1 Passive scan channels]
  B --> C{Free channel?}
  C -->|Yes| D[7.2.2 Start independent piconet]
  C -->|No| E[7.2.8 Start neighbor piconet]
  D --> F[7.2.7 Member forms child piconet]
  D --> G[7.2.3 PNC handover to successor]
  G --> H[7.2.9 Stop piconet]
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD
  A[具PNC能力的DEV] --> B[7.2.1 被动扫描信道]
  B --> C{有空闲信道?}
  C -->|有| D[7.2.2 启动独立微微网]
  C -->|无| E[7.2.8 启动邻居微微网]
  D --> F[7.2.7 成员组建子微微网]
  D --> G[7.2.3 移交给继任PNC]
  G --> H[7.2.9 停止微微网]

blocks.en: Association and disassociation (7.3). To join, an unassociated DEV sends an Association Request in the contention access period (CAP) or an association management CTA (MCTA); the PNC replies with an Association Response carrying the assigned device ID (DEVID) (7.3.1). Because the response is not directed (multiple joiners could collide on the acknowledgment), it uses no-ACK and each joiner matches its own address before sending a second request that confirms the DEVID. The PNC may answer a piconet services inquiry, returning service descriptions of other devices (7.3.2 piconet services). After membership is secured, the PNC repeatedly broadcasts the PNC Information command so everyone learns the full member list (7.3.3 broadcasting piconet information). Membership ends with disassociation (7.3.4): either side sends a Disassociation Request, and if a DEV stays silent past its association timeout period (ATP) — or misses too many beacons — it is dropped and its DEVID, streams, and group memberships are reclaimed.
blocks.zh: 关联与解关联（7.3）。要入网，未关联的 DEV 在竞争接入期（CAP）或关联管理 CTA（MCTA）中发送关联请求；PNC 回复关联响应，携带分配的设备标识（DEVID）（7.3.1）。由于该响应非定向（多个入网者可能在确认上冲突），它采用无确认（no-ACK），每个入网者先比对自身地址，再发送第二次请求以确认 DEVID。PNC 可应答微微网服务查询，返回其他设备的服务描述（7.3.2 微微网服务）。成员资格确立后，PNC 反复广播 PNC 信息命令，使所有人获知完整成员列表（7.3.3 广播微微网信息）。成员资格通过解关联结束（7.3.4）：任一方发送解关联请求；若某 DEV 沉默超过其关联超时期（ATP）——或丢失过多信标——则被剔除，其 DEVID、数据流和组成员关系被回收。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 440 90" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="6" y="30" width="60" height="30"/><text x="36" y="49" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Beacon</text><rect x="66" y="30" width="90" height="30"/><text x="111" y="49" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">CAP (CSMA/CA)</text><rect x="156" y="30" width="68" height="30"/><text x="190" y="49" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">CTA 1</text><rect x="224" y="30" width="68" height="30"/><text x="258" y="49" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">CTA 2</text><rect x="292" y="30" width="80" height="30"/><text x="332" y="49" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">CTA N</text><rect x="372" y="30" width="60" height="30"/><text x="402" y="49" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Beacon</text><text x="258" y="22" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">CTAP (TDMA, guard time between CTAs)</text><text x="219" y="80" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">one superframe</text></svg>

caption.en: The superframe (7.4): a beacon, an optional contention access period (CAP) using CSMA/CA, then the channel time allocation period (CTAP) of scheduled CTAs separated by guard time.
caption.zh: 超帧结构（7.4）：一个信标、一个可选的采用 CSMA/CA 的竞争接入期（CAP），随后是由保护时间隔开的多个已调度 CTA 组成的信道时间分配期（CTAP）。

blocks.en: Channel access (7.4). Time is divided into superframes, each beginning with a beacon and split into the CAP and the channel time allocation period (CTAP). In the CAP, devices contend using carrier sense multiple access with collision avoidance (CSMA/CA): they wait through interframe spaces and a random backoff before transmitting (7.4.2). The four interframe spaces (7.4.1) — minimum (MIFS), short (SIFS), backoff (BIFS), and retransmission (RIFS) — are tiny PHY-dependent gaps that keep frames from overlapping; an acknowledgment, for example, starts one SIFS after the frame it confirms. The backoff window grows with each retry through the table [7, 15, 31, 63]. In the CTAP (7.4.3), access is time-division multiple access (TDMA): the PNC grants each CTA a fixed start time and duration, so the owner needs no contention. CTAs come as dynamic (the PNC may move them every superframe) or pseudo-static (stable, used for isochronous streams and private reservations). Management CTAs (MCTAs) (7.4.3.3) carry commands; open and association MCTAs are contended using slotted aloha (7.4.3.4), where each device picks a random MCTA index from a contention window that grows on failure. Guard time (7.4.3.6) between CTAs absorbs clock drift, devices size their channel time requests to include frames, ACKs, and gaps (7.4.3.7), and a CTA owner may relinquish leftover time to another device (7.4.3.8).
blocks.zh: 信道接入（7.4）。时间被划分为超帧，每个超帧以信标开始，并分为 CAP 和信道时间分配期（CTAP）。在 CAP 中，设备采用载波侦听多址/冲突避免（CSMA/CA）竞争：发送前需等待若干帧间隔和一段随机退避（7.4.2）。四种帧间隔（7.4.1）——最小（MIFS）、短（SIFS）、退避（BIFS）、重传（RIFS）——是依赖 PHY 的极短间隙，用于防止帧重叠；例如确认帧在其所确认的帧之后一个 SIFS 才开始发送。退避窗口随每次重试按表 [7, 15, 31, 63] 增大。在 CTAP（7.4.3）中采用时分多址（TDMA）：PNC 为每个 CTA 分配固定的起始时间和持续时间，因此持有者无需竞争。CTA 分为动态型（PNC 可逐超帧移动）和伪静态型（位置稳定，用于等时流和私有预留）。管理 CTA（MCTA）（7.4.3.3）承载命令；开放型和关联型 MCTA 采用时隙 ALOHA 竞争（7.4.3.4），每个设备从一个失败时增大的竞争窗口中随机选取 MCTA 序号。CTA 间的保护时间（7.4.3.6）吸收时钟漂移；设备在计算信道时间请求时需把帧、确认和间隔都算进去（7.4.3.7）；CTA 持有者还可把剩余时间让渡给另一设备（7.4.3.8）。

blocks.en: Channel time management (7.5). Owning a CTA is one thing; reserving the right amount of it is another. For real-time media, isochronous stream management (7.5.1) negotiates a recurring slot: the originating DEV sends a Channel Time Request naming the target and asking for an unassigned stream index, and the PNC answers with a Channel Time Response granting a stream index and a number of time units (TUs) (7.5.1.1 creation). The same request/response can later modify a stream's size or hand its CTA to another device (7.5.1.2 modification), and any of the PNC, source, or target can terminate it, with the PNC announcing the end via a CTA Status IE in the beacon (7.5.1.3 termination). For bursty traffic, asynchronous channel time reservation (7.5.2) grants best-effort slots either per target or as a shared group allocation (7.5.2.1), released by the PNC or originator (7.5.2.2 termination). Finally, multicast group configuration (7.5.3) lets devices join a group address; the PNC assigns a group ID (GrpID) used as a shared destination DEVID and tears it down when the group empties.
blocks.zh: 信道时间管理（7.5）。拥有一个 CTA 是一回事，预留到合适的时长是另一回事。对于实时媒体，等时流管理（7.5.1）协商一个周期性时隙：发起方 DEV 发送信道时间请求，指明目标并申请一个未分配的流索引，PNC 以信道时间响应回复，授予流索引和若干时间单位（TU）（7.5.1.1 创建）。同样的请求/响应稍后可修改流的大小或把其 CTA 交给另一设备（7.5.1.2 修改）；PNC、源或目标任一方均可终止该流，由 PNC 在信标中通过 CTA 状态 IE 宣布结束（7.5.1.3 终止）。对于突发流量，异步信道时间预留（7.5.2）按目标分别或作为共享的组分配授予尽力而为的时隙（7.5.2.1），由 PNC 或发起方释放（7.5.2.2 终止）。最后，组播组配置（7.5.3）让设备加入某个组地址；PNC 分配一个组标识（GrpID）作为共享的目的 DEVID，并在组清空时将其拆除。

blocks.en: Synchronization (7.6). Every device, including the PNC, resets its superframe clock to zero at the start of the beacon preamble, so all CTA start times are measured from that instant. Implementations must keep their timers at least as accurate as pClockAccuracy (7.6.1 time accuracy). The PNC sends a beacon every superframe and, if it is too large, may split the extra information into broadcast Announce commands forming an extended beacon (7.6.2 beacon generation). Receivers (7.6.3 beacon reception) treat a beacon as lost if its FCS fails or it never arrives, and can skip re-reading unchanged information element (IE) sets when the beacon flags them as unchanged. Some IEs must be repeated across several beacons so power-saving devices still catch them; that repetition discipline is the beacon information announcement procedure (7.6.4). For directional millimeter-wave radios, 7.6.5 adds a quasi-omni superframe — beacons swept across antenna directions, a directional CAP, directional association, and transmit-direction training — so beam-steered devices can still find and track each other.
blocks.zh: 同步（7.6）。每个设备（包括 PNC）在信标前导码开始时将超帧时钟清零，因此所有 CTA 起始时间都以该时刻为基准计量。实现的定时精度必须至少达到 pClockAccuracy（7.6.1 时间精度）。PNC 每个超帧发送一次信标；若信标过大，可把额外信息拆入广播的 Announce 命令，构成扩展信标（7.6.2 信标生成）。接收方（7.6.3 信标接收）在 FCS 失败或信标未按期到达时视其为丢失，并可在信标标记某些信息元素（IE）集合“未改变”时跳过重读。某些 IE 必须在多个连续信标中重复，以便省电设备仍能捕获；这一重复规则即信标信息通告流程（7.6.4）。对于定向毫米波射频，7.6.5 增加了准全向超帧——信标在各天线方向上扫描发送、定向 CAP、定向关联以及发送方向训练——使波束指向的设备仍能相互发现并跟踪。

blocks.en: Fragmentation and aggregation (7.7, 7.8). When a payload is larger than the link can comfortably carry, fragmentation (7.7) splits each MAC service data unit (MSDU) — the data block handed down for delivery — into equal-size fragments, each tagged with a fragment number and a last-fragment number; the receiver defragments them back in order and discards any incomplete unit. The opposite optimization is aggregation (7.8), bundling several MSDUs into one frame to cut overhead. Standard aggregation (7.8.1) packs up to eight subframes behind a MAC subheader, each acknowledged together via a block acknowledgment (Blk-ACK) bitmap, and exchanges receive-buffer-size hints to avoid overflow. Low-latency aggregation (7.8.2) is for interactive bidirectional traffic: the two devices agree on a bidirectional CTA relinquish duration (BCRD) timer and swap transmit control back and forth within the CTA using the relinquish mechanism, padding with zero-length MSDUs to keep the link alive when there is nothing to send.
blocks.zh: 分片与聚合（7.7、7.8）。当负载超过链路可从容承载的大小时，分片（7.7）把每个 MAC 服务数据单元（MSDU，即下发待递交的数据块）切分为等大小片段，每片标注片段号和末片段号；接收方按序重组并丢弃任何不完整的单元。相反方向的优化是聚合（7.8），把多个 MSDU 捆绑进一个帧以降低开销。标准聚合（7.8.1）在一个 MAC 子头后最多打包八个子帧，通过块确认（Blk-ACK）位图统一确认，并交换接收缓冲区大小提示以避免溢出。低时延聚合（7.8.2）面向交互式双向流量：两设备约定一个双向 CTA 让渡时长（BCRD）定时器，在 CTA 内利用让渡机制来回交换发送控制权，并在无数据可发时用零长度 MSDU 填充以维持链路活跃。

summary.en: Coverage map — every 7.x unit and its exact clause
summary.zh: 覆盖地图——每个 7.x 单元及其确切条款号

blocks.en: Introduction & ground rules: 7.1 (HCS+FCS define 'received'; in-order delivery). Starting/maintaining/stopping piconets (7.2): 7.2.1 scanning through channels (passive, mMinChannelScan); 7.2.2 starting a piconet; 7.2.3 PNC handover (priority table, record transfer, beacon announcement); 7.2.4 preliminary handover (pre-load successor); 7.2.5 next PNC (fallback + implicit handover); 7.2.6 dependent PNC handover (target joins parent first); 7.2.7 child piconet (private pseudo-static CTA, child PNC is parent member); 7.2.8 neighbor piconet (NbrID, may run non-802.15.3); 7.2.9 stopping (7.2.9.1 independent/parent via PNC Shutdown IE, 7.2.9.2 parent stops dependent, 7.2.9.3 dependent terminates itself); 7.2.10 non-PNC-capable DEVs (simple devices, cannot coordinate). Association (7.3): 7.3.1 association (two requests, no-ACK response, ATP); 7.3.2 piconet services (inquiry, Announce/Probe); 7.3.3 broadcasting piconet information (PNC Information command); 7.3.4 disassociation (request, ATP/missed-beacon expiry, resource reclaim). Channel access (7.4): 7.4.1 interframe space (MIFS/SIFS/BIFS/RIFS); 7.4.2 CSMA/CA (BIFS + backoff window [7,15,31,63]); 7.4.3 CTAP/TDMA (7.4.3.1 dynamic vs pseudo-static CTAs, 7.4.3.3 MCTAs, 7.4.3.4 slotted aloha, 7.4.3.6 guard time, 7.4.3.7 calculating requests, 7.4.3.8 relinquishing). Channel time management (7.5): 7.5.1 isochronous streams (7.5.1.1 creation, 7.5.1.2 modification, 7.5.1.3 termination via CTA Status IE); 7.5.2 asynchronous reservation (7.5.2.1 group/individual, 7.5.2.2 termination); 7.5.3 multicast group configuration (GrpID). Synchronization (7.6): 7.6.1 time accuracy (pClockAccuracy); 7.6.2 beacon generation (extended beacon); 7.6.3 beacon reception (lost beacon, Unchanged flags); 7.6.4 beacon information announcement (mMinBeaconInfoRepeat); 7.6.5 superframe for directional PHYs (quasi-omni beacon/CAP/association/training). Fragmentation 7.7 (equal fragments, defragmentation). Aggregation (7.8): 7.8.1 standard (≤8 subframes, Blk-ACK); 7.8.2 low-latency (BCRD timer, CTA relinquish).
blocks.zh: 引言与基本规则：7.1（HCS+FCS 共同定义“收到”；按序递交）。微微网启动/维护/停止（7.2）：7.2.1 扫描信道（被动，mMinChannelScan）；7.2.2 启动微微网；7.2.3 PNC 移交（优先级表、记录传输、信标宣布）；7.2.4 预备移交（预载继任者）；7.2.5 下一任 PNC（备援＋隐式移交）；7.2.6 从属 PNC 移交（目标先加入父网）；7.2.7 子微微网（私有伪静态 CTA，子 PNC 为父网成员）；7.2.8 邻居微微网（NbrID，可运行非 802.15.3）；7.2.9 停止（7.2.9.1 独立/父网经 PNC 关闭 IE，7.2.9.2 父网停止从属网，7.2.9.3 从属网自行终止）；7.2.10 不具 PNC 能力的 DEV（简单设备，无法协调）。关联（7.3）：7.3.1 关联（两次请求、无确认响应、ATP）；7.3.2 微微网服务（查询、Announce/Probe）；7.3.3 广播微微网信息（PNC 信息命令）；7.3.4 解关联（请求、ATP/丢信标到期、资源回收）。信道接入（7.4）：7.4.1 帧间隔（MIFS/SIFS/BIFS/RIFS）；7.4.2 CSMA/CA（BIFS＋退避窗口 [7,15,31,63]）；7.4.3 CTAP/TDMA（7.4.3.1 动态与伪静态 CTA、7.4.3.3 MCTA、7.4.3.4 时隙 ALOHA、7.4.3.6 保护时间、7.4.3.7 计算请求、7.4.3.8 让渡）。信道时间管理（7.5）：7.5.1 等时流（7.5.1.1 创建、7.5.1.2 修改、7.5.1.3 经 CTA 状态 IE 终止）；7.5.2 异步预留（7.5.2.1 组/单独、7.5.2.2 终止）；7.5.3 组播组配置（GrpID）。同步（7.6）：7.6.1 时间精度（pClockAccuracy）；7.6.2 信标生成（扩展信标）；7.6.3 信标接收（丢失信标、未改变标志）；7.6.4 信标信息通告（mMinBeaconInfoRepeat）；7.6.5 定向 PHY 超帧（准全向信标/CAP/关联/训练）。分片 7.7（等大小片段、重组）。聚合（7.8）：7.8.1 标准（≤8 子帧、Blk-ACK）；7.8.2 低时延（BCRD 定时器、CTA 让渡）。

cites.note: 7.1 introduction (HCS/FCS define correct reception; in-order delivery) and 7.2 piconet types
7.2.1 scanning, 7.2.2 starting, 7.2.3 PNC handover with priority table, 7.2.4 preliminary handover, 7.2.5 next PNC
7.2.6 dependent PNC handover, 7.2.7 child piconet, 7.2.8 neighbor piconet, 7.2.9 stopping, 7.2.10 non-PNC DEVs
7.3.1 association, 7.3.2 piconet services, 7.3.3 broadcasting piconet info, 7.3.4 disassociation
7.4 channel access: superframe, 7.4.1 IFS, 7.4.2 CSMA/CA, 7.4.3 CTAP TDMA, MCTAs, slotted aloha, guard time, requests, relinquish
7.5 channel time management: isochronous stream create/modify/terminate, asynchronous reservation/termination, multicast group
7.6 synchronization: time accuracy, beacon generation/reception, info announcement, directional PHY superframe
